homepage.title: Fix your car directly – fast, easy, safe

how_it_works.title: How it works
how_it_works.subtitle: Three easy steps to your new workshop
how_it_works.intro: Fixa2an makes it easy to get help with car issues – whether you have an inspection report or not.

step1.title: Photo
step1.description: Take a photo & upload your inspection report.

step2.title: Get offers
step2.description: Receive quotes from garages near you.

step3.title: Choose workshop
step3.description: Choose a garage and book instantly.

how_it_works.mobile_step1_title: Upload report or describe the problem
how_it_works.mobile_step1_desc: Take a photo, upload a PDF or tell us what needs fixing.
how_it_works.mobile_step2_desc: Workshops near you send quotes – compare price, rating and distance.
how_it_works.mobile_step3_desc: Pick the offer that suits you and book your appointment.
how_it_works.why_desc: All workshops are verified and reviewed by other customers before they can send offers.
how_it_works.not_only_desc: You can also describe other car problems – brakes, service, warning lights and more.
how_it_works.tip: Tip! You can always return here by clicking "How it works".

features.title: Why choose Fixa2an?
features.subtitle: We connect you with trusted, verified workshops. Get competitive offers, transparent pricing, and secure payments - all in one place.

transparent.title: Transparent prices
transparent.description: Compare prices, times and reviews before you decide.

secure.description: Pay the workshop directly and securely.

workshop.title: Get new customers directly from inspection
workshop.subtitle: We send requests when car owners get issues. You choose which jobs you want to quote on. No fixed fee - you only pay when you get a job.
workshop.certified_desc: All workshops are reviewed for customer safety.

mobile.subtitle: Upload your inspection report and get multiple quotes from verified workshops.
mobile.subtitle_line2: Compare prices, reviews and choose for yourself.

section_how_it_works.title: How it works
section_how_it_works.subtitle: Three simple steps to multiple quotes from verified workshops near you.
section_how_it_works.step1_desc: Take a photo of your inspection report or upload a PDF.
section_how_it_works.step2_desc: Your request is automatically sent to relevant and verified workshops.
section_how_it_works.step3_desc: Compare price, reviews and availability – choose the workshop that suits you best.

section_why_choose.title: Why car owners choose Fixa2an
section_why_choose.subtitle: Compare multiple quotes from verified workshops – on your terms.
section_why_choose.feature1_desc: Receive several quotes and choose the one that suits you best.
section_why_choose.feature2_desc: See price, reviews and what's included before you decide.
section_why_choose.feature3_desc: One request reaches multiple workshops at the same time.
section_why_choose.feature4_desc: Only verified workshops can submit quotes.
section_why_choose.free_desc: Create a case and compare quotes at no cost or obligation.

section_faq.title: Frequently asked questions
section_faq.subtitle: Here you'll find answers to common questions about Fixa2an.
section_faq.q1_title: Do I need an inspection report?
section_faq.q1_desc: Yes, if you want quotes right away. Upload a photo or PDF so workshops see exactly what needs fixing. If you don't have a report, you can describe the problem manually instead.
section_faq.q2_desc: Yes. It costs nothing to create a case or receive quotes. You only pay if you choose to hire a workshop.
section_faq.q3_title: When and how do I pay?
section_faq.q3_desc: You pay only after you've chosen a workshop and the work is done. Payment goes directly to the workshop according to their payment options. Fixa2an never charges you as a car owner.
section_faq.q4_title: How quickly will I get quotes?
section_faq.q4_desc: Most users receive their first quotes within 24 hours, often much faster.
section_faq.q5_title: Do I have to accept one of the quotes?
section_faq.q5_desc: No. You decide entirely on your own. If no quote suits you, you can decline at no cost.
section_faq.q6_title: How do I know the workshops are trustworthy?
section_faq.q6_desc: All workshops on Fixa2an are vetted before they can join the platform. You can also compare prices, reviews and information before you decide.

help.title: Help and support
help.subtitle: We're here to help. Reach us anytime.
help.cta_subtitle: Send us an email and we'll get back to you as soon as we can.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.q1: How do I submit a service request?
faq.a1: Upload your inspection report, fill in your vehicle details, and submit. Verified workshops near you will send offers.
faq.q2: How do I accept an offer?
faq.a2: Open Offers, compare quotes, and tap "Choose workshop" on the one that suits you best.
faq.q3: How do I cancel a booking?
faq.a3: Open the booked case, tap "Cancel job", and provide a reason. Late cancellations may affect your trust score.
faq.a4: Yes — only workshops approved through our verification process can receive requests and send offers.
faq.a5: Payment is made directly to the workshop after the work is completed. Fixa2an does not handle payments.

sections.title: Who we are
sections.body: Fixa2an AB ("Fixa2an", "we", "us") operates a marketplace that connects car owners with verified workshops in Sweden. This policy explains how we collect, use and protect your personal data.

sections.title: What data we collect
sections.body: We may collect contact details, account information, vehicle details, service requests, inspection documents, messages between users, booking information and technical data such as IP address and device information.

sections.title: How we use your data
sections.body: We use personal data to provide the service, match requests with workshops, send notifications, improve the platform, prevent misuse and comply with legal obligations.

sections.title: Sharing of data
sections.body: Relevant request and contact information is shared with workshops when you submit a case or accept an offer. We may also use trusted service providers for hosting, email delivery and analytics.

sections.title: Your rights
sections.body: You may request access, correction or deletion of your personal data, and object to certain processing, in accordance with applicable data protection law. Contact us at info@fixa2an.se.

sections.title: About the service
sections.body: Fixa2an is a digital marketplace where car owners can submit repair requests and compare quotes from verified workshops. Fixa2an is not a workshop and does not perform vehicle repairs.

sections.title: Accounts and use
sections.body: You are responsible for the accuracy of the information you provide and for keeping your login details secure. You agree not to misuse the platform or submit unlawful content.

sections.title: Quotes and bookings
sections.body: Quotes are provided by workshops. When you accept an offer, you enter into an agreement directly with the workshop regarding price, work and appointment.

sections.title: Payments
sections.body: Unless otherwise stated, payment for repair work is made directly to the workshop. Fixa2an may charge workshops a commission or service fee according to separate partner terms.

sections.title: Liability
sections.body: Fixa2an facilitates contact between users but is not responsible for the quality, timing or outcome of workshop services, except where mandatory law provides otherwise.

sections.title: What are cookies?
sections.body: Cookies are small text files stored on your device when you visit a website. They help the site function, remember preferences and understand how the service is used.

sections.title: Cookies we use
sections.body: We use necessary cookies for login, security and core functionality. We may also use analytics cookies to understand usage and improve the experience.

sections.title: Managing cookies
sections.body: You can control or delete cookies through your browser settings. Please note that disabling certain cookies may affect how the website works.

sections.title: Contact
sections.body: If you have questions about our use of cookies, contact us at info@fixa2an.se.

footer.description: We help car owners easily compare quotes from verified workshops after a failed inspection.
